div1.entryFree: Unprovided, unprepared, not supplied with what is necessary; as not in sufficient preparation to meet an enemy: H6C V, 4, 63. unarmed: R3 III, 2, 75. Lr. II, 1, 54. not decently dressed: Shr. III, 2, 101. wanting money: H4A III, 3, 213. not duly prepared for death: H5 IV, 1, 183. With of: I yet am u. of a pair of bases, Per. II, 1, 166.
